notes: Level 6 manual review override shard for spell indexes 5-9 in generated discovery row order.

conjure-fey::choice_or_mode.issue: The Fey appearance choice is now represented as a summoning form option.
conjure-fey::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.

conjure-fey::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The spirit melee spell attack, hit condition, 3d12 plus spellcasting ability modifier Psychic damage, and +1d12 slot scaling are represented.
conjure-fey::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional attack branch required for this pass.
conjure-fey::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE hit effect and summon special action.

conjure-fey::target_filter_or_eligibilit.issue: Runtime now targets a point and summons a Medium Fey spirit, but the initial and later teleport destinations still need first-class unoccupied-visible-space eligibility.

conjure-fey::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The later-turn Bonus Action to teleport the spirit and make its attack is now represented as a granted action.
conjure-fey::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional sustain field required for this pass.
conjure-fey::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by grantedActions and MOVEMENT teleport effect.

conjure-fey::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible placement and visible teleport destination, already represented by lineOfSight targeting and the open placement-eligibility bucket.

conjure-fey::summon_or_controlled_entity.issue: The Medium Fey spirit, duration, appearance choice, shared initiative/control surface, attack action, and non-persistent summon lifecycle are now represented.
conjure-fey::summon_or_controlled_entity.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional summon field required for this pass.
conjure-fey::summon_or_controlled_entity.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by SUMMONING effect and associated attack/status/movement effects.

conjure-fey::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The spirit's 30-foot later-turn teleport is now represented as a MOVEMENT teleport effect.

conjure-fey::status_or_state_change.issue: The Frightened condition until the start of the caster's next turn is now represented with hit-triggered status data and source details in the description.
conjure-fey::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for this pass.

contingency::choice_or_mode.issue: The contingent spell must be chosen from spells level 5 or lower that the caster can cast, that take an action, and that can target the caster; runtime lacks contingent spell eligibility fields.
contingency::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add contingent-spell choice and eligibility fields.

contingency::created_object_or_structure.issue: The detector matched the Water Breathing example trigger; this is illustrative trigger prose, not a created object or structure mechanic.

contingency::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The user-defined trigger, first trigger firing, forced activation whether desired or not, self-only contingent spell target, one-contingency limit, recast replacement, and component-possession ending are all prose-only.
contingency::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Add contingent trigger, firing, replacement, self-targeting, and component-dependency fields.

contingency::resource_or_consumption.issue: The caster expends spell slots for both Contingency and the contingent spell, but runtime lacks secondary spell-slot expenditure data.
contingency::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked spell resource cost fields.

contingency::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched the Water Breathing example trigger involving water; this is an example trigger condition, not an environmental change caused by Contingency.

create-homunculus::message_or_communicat.issue: The detector matched the spoken incantation casting component; this is verbal spellcasting, not a message or communication mechanic.

create-homunculus::travel_or_planar_move.issue: The long-rest Hit Dice transfer requires the homunculus to be on the same plane of existence; runtime lacks same-plane eligibility for that later resource transfer.

create-homunculus::object_stats_or_damag.issue: The self-damage, unreducible damage, Hit Dice spending, caster hit point maximum reduction, homunculus hit point maximum/current hit point increase, 1 HP floor, long-rest ending, death ending, one-homunculus limit, and spell-failure condition remain prose-only.
create-homunculus::object_stats_or_damag.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked-created-creature stat transfer and singleton summon fields.

create-undead::choice_or_mode.issue: Runtime now records three targets and command options, but animate-vs-reassert-control mode and higher-slot corpse/undead-form choices remain prose-only.
create-undead::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animate/reassert mode and slot-scaled undead form choice fields.

create-undead::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The detector matched Bonus Action command text; this is command economy, not an attack or save modifier.

create-undead::target_filter_or_eligibil.issue: Runtime now allows three object targets, but Medium or Small Humanoid corpse eligibility and night-only casting are not typed.
create-undead::target_filter_or_eligibil.recommendedTemplateChange: Add corpse size/type and time-of-day casting eligibility fields.

create-undead::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The each-turn Bonus Action command within 120 feet is now represented as a granted action and control option.
create-undead::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional sustain field required for this pass.

create-undead::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched Monster Manual stat-block references; this is external stat-block lookup, not a vision/light/sound mechanic.

create-undead::summon_or_controlled_enti.issue: Command action economy is represented, but animated undead stat-block identities, 24-hour control expiry, reassert-control window, default Dodge/move behavior, and slot-scaled Ghoul/Ghast/Wight/Mummy options remain under-modeled.
create-undead::summon_or_controlled_enti.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated-undead entity and control-duration fields.

disintegrate::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The creature Dexterity save, negating save outcome, 10d6+40 Force damage, and +3d6 scaling are represented.

disintegrate::terrain_or_surface.issue: The detector matched Wall of Force as an example magical-force creation target; this is object/structure targeting, not terrain or surface behavior.

disintegrate::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible target selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

disintegrate::created_object_or_structur.issue: The spell can target creations of magical force and automatically disintegrate a Large-or-smaller nonmagical object or magical-force creation, but runtime lacks an object/force-creation destruction branch.
disintegrate::created_object_or_structur.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object and magical-force creation disintegration fields.

disintegrate::object_stats_or_damageabil.issue: Disintegration at 0 hit points, nonmagical worn/carried item destruction, True Resurrection/Wish revival restriction, automatic Large-or-smaller object destruction, and Huge-or-larger 10-foot Cube partial destruction remain prose-only beyond the damage description.
disintegrate::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedTemplateChange: Add disintegration aftermath and partial-object destruction fields.
